ddls:
CREATE TABLE "initiatives" (
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each initiative */,
  "initiative_name" TEXT /* Name of the initiative */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the initiative is taking place */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the initiative is taking place */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the initiative is taking place */,
  "recipient" TEXT /* Recipient organization of the initiative */,
  "links" TEXT /* Links to external resources or information about the initiative */,
  "initiative_count" INTEGER /* Number of initiatives in the given state, county, and city */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the initiative started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the initiative is expected to end */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the initiative */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the initiative */,
  "goal" TEXT /* Main goal or objective of the initiative */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget for the initiative */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person for the initiative */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("initiative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiatives_county FOREIGN KEY ("county") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiatives_recipient FOREIGN KEY ("recipient") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiatives_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiatives_city FOREIGN KEY ("city") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "governor" TEXT /* Name of the current governor */,
  "official_website" TEXT /* Link to the official state government website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "county_seat" TEXT /* Name of the county seat */,
  "county_website" TEXT /* Link to the official county government website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the city is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "city_website" TEXT /* Link to the official city government website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient organization */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Name of the recipient organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the recipient organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the recipient organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the recipient organization */,
  "website" TEXT /* Link to the official website of the recipient organization */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the organization was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initiative the resource is associated with */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the external resource or information */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource */,
  "resource_size" TEXT /* Size of the resource file */,
  "resource_format" TEXT /* Format of the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiative_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress event */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initiative being tracked */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was recorded */,
  "progress_description" TEXT /* Description of the progress made */,
  "progress_status" TEXT /* Current status of the progress */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for the progress */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the progress */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_progress_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiative_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact measurement */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initiative being measured */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was measured */,
  "impact_measure" TEXT /* Description of the impact achieved */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact */,
  "impact_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to measure the impact */,
  "impact_source" TEXT /* Source of the impact data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_impact_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiative_partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initiative the partner is involved with */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the partner organization */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the partner in the initiative */,
  "partner_type" TEXT /* Type of partner */,
  "partner_website" TEXT /* Link to the official website of the partner organization */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the partnership started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the partnership is expected to end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_partners_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiative_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding event */,
  "initiative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the initiative receiving funding */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding received */,
  "funding_date" TEXT /* Date when the funding was received */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of the funding */,
  "funding_type" TEXT /* Type of funding */,
  "funding_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions attached to the funding */,
  "expected_impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_initiative_funding_initiative_id FOREIGN KEY ("initiative_id") REFERENCES initiatives ("initiative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "initiative_users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, partner, community member) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
